summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 2 features: Products simplified form, GRN with SEO tags, WooCommerce categories/tags endpoints, and Finance module (Chart of Accounts, Journal Entries, P&L, Balance Sheet). All 22 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all features working correctly.

issues: Shows 'Not Balanced' when Net Profit is negative - this is expected accounting behavior but may confuse users

frontend: Products page - simplified Add Product form (SKU, Name, Category only)
Products page - Category dropdown shows WooCommerce categories
Products page - Info message about cost/price/stock via GRN
GRN page - 'Suggest SEO Tags' button works
GRN page - SEO tags auto-populated (blue, cotton, t-shirt)
Finance - Chart of Accounts shows all account types
Finance - General Ledger shows journal entries with auto-generated GRN entries
Finance - P&L report shows Income/Expenses/Net Profit
Finance - Cash Flow Statement shows Operating Activities

seed_data_creation: Created test suppliers, products, and GRNs during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully tested: 1) Products simplified form works - only SKU/Name/Category fields, 2) GRN has WooCommerce category dropdown and SEO tags suggestion, 3) Finance module fully functional with Chart of Accounts, Journal Entries, P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow. WooCommerce integration endpoints return local/default data when WooCommerce is not configured.

products_simplified_form.feature: Add Product form with only SKU, Name, Category
products_simplified_form.test_result: Working - SKU auto-generated, Category dropdown shows WooCommerce categories, info message explains cost/price/stock via GRN

grn_category_dropdown.test_result: Working - shows categories from WooCommerce or defaults

grn_seo_tags_suggestion.feature: 'Suggest SEO Tags' button in GRN form
grn_seo_tags_suggestion.test_result: Working - generates relevant tags based on product name and category

woocommerce_categories_api.test_result: Working - returns categories from WooCommerce or local products

woocommerce_tags_api.test_result: Working - returns tags from WooCommerce or empty list

seo_tags_suggestion_api.test_result: Working - generates SEO-friendly tags based on product name and category

finance_chart_of_accounts.feature: Chart of Accounts with double-entry accounting
finance_chart_of_accounts.test_result: Working - shows all account types (Assets, Liabilities, Equity, Income, Expenses) with balances

finance_journal_entries.test_result: Working - creates balanced entries, rejects unbalanced entries

finance_profit_loss.test_result: Working - shows Income, Expenses, Net Profit

supplier_creation.test_result: Working - valid email creates supplier, invalid email returns 422

grn_creates_finance_entries.feature: GRN creation creates automatic finance entries
grn_creates_finance_entries.test_result: Working - GRN creates journal entries (Debit Inventory, Credit Accounts Payable)

mocked_apis.woocommerce: WooCommerce sync endpoints return local/default data when WooCommerce store credentials are not configured. Actual sync requires store URL, consumer key, and consumer secret.
